title: Issue while running on docker image
body:
Hey,

I'm trying to run verilator through docker using both custom container [running compilation on the latest stable branch] and the official one provided in the docker hub but every time  I try, I have the same output down below. Although if I run locally in the terminal either linux/Mac, I see no issues and the commands returns without any errors. Is there another flag I can turn it on to understand what's causing verilator to finish with error while running through docker run?
```bash
docker run --rm --name verilator_alexa -e VERILATOR_ROOT=/verilator -v /Users/aignacio/projects/alexa:/alexa -w /alexa verilator_aignacio verilator -CFLAGS "-I../tb/cpp/elfio -I../tb/cpp/inc -O0 -g3 -Wall -std=c++11 -Werror -DIRAM_KB_SIZE=\"2*1024 \" -DDRAM_KB_SIZE=\"128\" -DIRAM_ADDR=\"0x80000000\" -DDRAM_ADDR=\"0x10000000\" -DWAVEFORM_USE=\"0 \" -DWAVEFORM_FST=\"alexa_waves.fst\"" --top-module alexa_sim --Mdir output_verilator -f verilator.flags --debug --debug-check -Irtl/inc +define+IRAM_KB_SIZE=2*1024 +define+DRAM_KB_SIZE=128 +define+ENTRY_ADDR=\'h8000_0000 +define+DISPLAY_TEST=0 +define+BP_ADDRS_CHN=0 +define+BP_WRDTA_CHN=0 +define+BP_BWRES_CHN=0 +define+SIMULATION +define+RV_COMPLIANCE rtl/inc/axi_pkg.svh rtl/inc/alexa_pkg.svh rtl/inc/core_bus_pkg.svh rtl/inc/riscv_pkg.svh rtl/inc/utils_pkg.sv rtl//fetch.sv rtl//fifo.sv rtl//alexa.sv rtl//inc/utils_pkg.sv rtl//wb.sv rtl//reset_sync.sv rtl//execute.sv rtl//cb_to_axi.sv rtl//register_file.sv rtl//lsu.sv rtl//skid_buffer.sv rtl//csr.sv rtl//decode.sv tb//axi_mem_wbp.sv tb//axi_mem.sv tb//alexa_sim.sv tb/cpp/testbench.cpp -o alexa_sim
```
